creator: jkois@freebsd.org
text:
-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
Hash: SHA1

The information in the patch is not 100% correct:

- - Up to 7.2-RELEASE there is no "FreeBSD-" at the beginning of the ISO
names
- - Up to 7.2-RELEASE there are 2 other images:  "disc2" and "disc3".
According to the release announcement "disc2" and "disc3" contain
additional packages.

Things changed with 7.3-RELEASE.  Now we have
- - a dvd image
- - "FreeBSD-" at the beginning of the ISO name.

But I will use the provided patch as a starting point.



- -- 
 Johann Kois
 jkois(at)FreeBSD.org
 FreeBSD Documentation Project
 FreeBSD German Documentation Project - https://doc.bsdgroup.de
